contacts.description: Ranked list of 2-4 contacts across distinct decision-making personas

title.description: Current job title at the target company

persona.description: Decision-making role this contact plays in a typical deal

confidence.description: Confidence that this person is the right contact to reach

confidence_reason.description: Brief explanation of the confidence level

in_crm.description: Whether this contact already exists in the CRM

crm_contact_id.description: CRM record ID if in_crm is true

tenure_months.description: Approximate months in current role, if determinable

notes.description: Personalization notes, recent activity, or caveats (e.g., 'recently started', 'was unresponsive in Q3 2024 outreach')

primary_contact.description: The single highest-priority contact to sequence first

rationale.description: Why this person was selected as the primary contact over others

company_domain.description: Echo of the input company domain for use by downstream agents

discovery_notes.description: Notes on gaps, limitations of the search, or important caveats about the contact list
